generator: Hugging Face FLUX.1-schnell via Inference API

commonParams.background: pure white background, seamless white, no shadows on background
commonParams.lighting: soft natural studio lighting from left, 5600K, no harsh shadows
commonParams.lens: 85mm f/2.8 macro lens, shallow depth of field
commonParams.composition: centered subject, clean negative space for text overlay
commonParams.avoid: no props, no hands, no text, no logos, no dark backgrounds, no warm yellow casts
